title: arctium heterophyllum
intro: Arctium heterophyllum, also known as the variable burdock, is a biennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Arctium heterophyllum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
